data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Automatic payment (subscription)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes a recurring subscription service but does not explicitly mention the implementation of automatic payments. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary evidence to support the existence of automatic payment functionality is absent.
gaps: Automatic payment functionality is not explicitly covered in the linked use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
